title: The Alastor demon Dweller [WB]
description: this mod installs a creature, the special thing is the name Alastor
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/PcQqUy2yV2w" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![CurseForge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eae9df7cd4d76c4661a3cdf89b63f2e36ae6ada5_0.webp)

[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/alastordweller](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/alastordweller)

this mod installs a creature, the special thing is the name Alastor






 when you hear the music you are hunted but not always and if Alastor sees you then you have to run away but if you fight then Alastor will rage then an Alastor demon turns into phase 2




bigger, faster, stronger then there is no escape but if you survive then you are lucky but you don't have long luck if you are unlucky

then you have to fight or die then if you survive you have to defeat him and then comes the worst phase 3

Alastor demon of the horrors is the worst but if you want to know then you can look it up yourself have fun



The Shadow is one whose everywhere on the surface and in the cave day and night




when you hear the radio sound is the Shadow but when it sees you then it comes to you then stuns you and create 2 minions to kill you



The Demon Minions is a small demon that only comes together at night with the group and comes out of the shadows and the Alastor demon of the horrors also comes help minions to alastor help to kill you






update 2.0.7          (1.20.1)

not : 1.19.4 and not 1.19.2 sorry I try to fix?



Alastor look at me

This is someone who is looking at you but you have to look if you don't look then attack you






The Shadow demon 

a shadow that is rare to see but it is very strong and just wants to nerf you




Deal chat

I have set it up so that you can make a deal with Alastor as a chat so that you win a price or bad price

Fix demon minions to despawn

Fix alastor spawn



update 3.4.2          (1.20.1)  AND  (1.19.4)

not 1.19.2 is bug error sorry I try to fix?



alastor can now speak

50+ sound

new still

more block

bug fix

9 = structures

1 secret

and more





info now 1.19.2 is out

aber eine problem hat 1.19.2

no 3D blocks, no big effect and no more story



good luck to play
